countryCompare.title: Country Comparison
countryCompare.subtitle: Side-by-side AI-powered comparison of cost of living, visas, jobs, education, healthcare, and more — for students and immigrants.
countryCompare.analyzingDesc: Cost of living, visas, jobs, housing, education, healthcare, culture, and banking
countryCompare.sameCountry: Please select two different countries to compare.
countryCompare.selectPrompt: Select two countries above and click Compare
countryCompare.selectPromptDesc: Get a detailed side-by-side comparison powered by AI
countryCompare.disclaimer: AI-generated comparison based on publicly available data. Verify specific figures with official sources before making decisions.

footer.description: Trusted companion for international students and immigrants — before, during, and after their journey.

landing.heroSubtitle: One platform for visa guidance, verified housing, mentorship, jobs, and life support — before, during, and after you arrive.
landing.pillarsTitle: Everything you need, end to end.
landing.pillarsSubtitle: Common App stops at admission. LinkedIn stops at job search. GlobalBridge supports you through the entire journey.
landing.pillarAiDesc: Conversational guidance for any visa, any country. Step-by-step document checklists.
landing.pillarHousingDesc: Identity-checked landlords. Roommate matching. Bookings before you board your flight.
landing.pillarMentorDesc: Connect with people who lived your destination for years. Cultural hubs and events.
landing.pillarJobsDesc: Filter by visa sponsors. AI resume builder. Sponsorship-history tracker.
landing.pillarToolkitDesc: Cost calculators, healthcare guides, banking setup, emergency SOS — all in one place.
landing.assistantTitle: Visa navigation, as simple as a conversation.
landing.assistantSubtitle: No more expensive immigration consultants for basic questions. Get country-specific, step-by-step guidance with personalised document checklists.
landing.assistantFeature1: Dynamic question flows for any visa type
landing.bonusTitle: The features that make us the best in the world.
landing.bonusCoachDesc: Reviews your essays, scores against history, suggests improvements.
landing.bonusLangDesc: Every page translated. Auto-detect your language.
landing.bonusScholarshipDesc: Profile once. AI scans verified database continuously.
landing.bonusDocDesc: Upload passport, bank statement. AI flags rejection triggers.
landing.bonusPeerDesc: Anonymous feedback from verified mentors with structured rubrics.
landing.bonusSOSDesc: One-tap alert to contacts, embassy, and student union.
landing.testimonial1Quote: The AI assistant walked me through my Canada study permit in 20 minutes. Saved me $400 on a consultant.
landing.testimonial2Quote: I found verified housing two weeks before flying out. No scams, no surprises. Met my roommate via the matching tool.
landing.testimonial3Quote: Connected with three Ghanaian alumni from my target university before I even applied. Game changer.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of students using GlobalBridge to navigate their international education with confidence.

visa.title: AI Visa Assistant
visa.dek: Any visa. Any country. Zero guesswork.
visa.detail: Conversational guidance that adapts to your destination, your passport, and your timeline — with a step-by-step document checklist that updates itself as embassies change the rules.
visa.bullet3: Deadline tracking with reminders that actually fire

housing.title: Verified Housing
housing.dek: A key waiting for you, not a listing that vanishes.
housing.detail: Every landlord is identity-checked before their listing goes live. Match with roommates who share your move-in date, and book your place before you board.
housing.bullet2: Roommate matching by city, dates, and habits
housing.bullet3: Book and pay before you land — no showings needed

jobs.title: Jobs & Internships
jobs.dek: Filtered for the one thing that matters: sponsorship.
jobs.detail: Search roles that actually sponsor your visa type, track a company's sponsorship history before you apply, and let the AI resume builder tune your CV per market.
jobs.bullet1: Filter by visa-sponsor status, not guesswork
jobs.bullet2: AI resume builder tuned to local hiring norms

mentorship.title: Mentorship Network
mentorship.dek: People who already lived it, one message away.
mentorship.detail: Connect with people who've spent years in your destination city. Join cultural hubs and events built around where you're headed, not where you're from.

lifeSupport.title: Life Support Toolkit
lifeSupport.detail: Cost calculators, healthcare guides, banking setup, and an emergency SOS — all in one place, so the small logistics never become the hard part.
lifeSupport.tool1Note: Budget by city, down to groceries
lifeSupport.tool3Note: Open an account before you land

hero.label: Study abroad, held together
hero.title:
Your move,
held together.
hero.subtitle: Visa guidance, verified housing, mentorship, jobs, and life support — one platform, before, during, and after you arrive.

r1.quote: It told me exactly which biometrics appointment to book first — I would have missed the window otherwise.

r2.quote: I signed my lease from home. No video call landlord ever went quiet on me.

r3.quote: My mentor met me at arrivals. That's not something a brochure tells you to expect.

r4.quote: Every listing I applied to already sponsored my visa type. I stopped wasting weeks on dead ends.

r5.quote: The bank setup guide alone saved me a week of standing in the wrong lines.

reviews.label: Proof, not promises
reviews.title: Real people. Real moves.
reviews.subtitle: Thousands of immigrants trust GlobalBridge every year — here's what they say.

r6.quote: The checklist flagged a document I did not even know Canada required. That one line saved my whole application.

r7.quote: I filtered for companies that sponsor and stopped guessing. Three interviews in two weeks, all visa-ready.

r8.quote: My landlord was verified before I ever paid a cent. In Amsterdam, that peace of mind is everything.

r9.quote: My mentor had walked the exact Lagos-to-UK path five years earlier. He answered questions I did not know to ask.

r10.quote: The cost calculator matched my real Lisbon budget almost to the euro. Nothing caught me off guard.

r11.quote: It rebuilt my timeline the day the rules changed. I would have missed a deadline without it.

r12.quote: The resume builder reworked my CV for the US market and the callbacks started immediately.

auth.heroTitle: Your trusted bridge to studying, working, and settling abroad.
auth.heroDescription: AI-guided visa support, verified housing, mentorship, and career opportunities — all in one secure platform built for international students and immigrants.
auth.testimonial: GlobalBridge walked me through my entire student visa and helped me find safe housing before I even landed. It felt like having a guide in every country.
auth.signupSubtitle: Join thousands building their future abroad — it takes a minute.
auth.signinSubtitle: Sign in to continue your journey.
auth.encryptedNotice: Your information is encrypted and never shared.

assistant.title: AI Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Your personal guide for studying abroad
assistant.placeholder: Ask me anything about visas, universities, housing...
assistant.welcomeMessage: Hello! I'm your GlobalBridge AI Assistant. I can help you with visa guidance, university applications, housing, jobs, and more. How can I help you today?
assistant.suggestion1: How do I get a student visa for Canada?
assistant.suggestion2: What documents do I need for a US F-1 visa?
assistant.suggestion4: How much does studying in Germany cost?
assistant.errorMessage: I'm having trouble responding. Please try again.
assistant.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this conversation?
